entries.title: Component Hotspots — Triage Snapshot (Stale)
verified_against: current ls internal/ai = 25 .go files, agent_*=0, comment_*=5 (doc claims 43 files, agent_*=11, comment_*=12)
entries.notes: Relocated in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21; v1 metadata kept — cross-cutting stale/draft plan). Reviewed in PR24D. Explicitly-dated 2026-06-14 inventory snapshot now OUTDATED: internal/ai dropped 43->25 .go files, the agent_* cluster (11) moved to internal/drivers/copilot, comment_* 12->5, so its 'internal/ai is the first refactor target' recommendation has partially already been executed. Companion rules doc component-structure-rules stays active; this snapshot needs regeneration.

entries.title: Component Structure Rules
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24B; moved to platform-foundation/decisions/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21) — the path CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md name for component ownership. Self-declared ACTIVE_BINDING; enforced warn-only by scripts/check_component_structure.py with companion COMPONENT_HOTSPOTS.md. Domain-level decision record; kept v1 metadata (v2 decision layer requires a feature owner).

entries.title: Platform Domain Model (DOMAIN.md)
verified_against: owner packages internal/auth, internal/platform, frontend/src/platform exist
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24H; moved to specs/domains/platform-foundation/DOMAIN.md in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21) — the 'Platform vocabulary' path AGENTS.md names. Living canonical vocabulary (mandatory reading); the owner packages it names (internal/auth, internal/platform, frontend/src/platform) exist. Domain-root glossary; kept v1 metadata (no v2 layer fits a vocabulary doc).

entries.title: SaaS Automation Principles (Vision Draft)
